steps.title: Identify what information the goal requires
steps.content: The student's goal is explicitly stated: identify the year that The Canon of Medicine was published. The notes directly provide this information: “It was published in the year 1025 CE.”

steps.title: Select the option that includes the publication date
steps.content: The correct answer directly presents the book and its publication year (1025 CE). Those choices, and D each reference information from the notes—the author's background, the book's historical use, and its content—but none state when it was published. That confirms A is correct.
